blended.narrative: Tuckerman Ravine is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 38°F.
Saturday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
